name: conductor-oss-workspace
author: Conductor Contributors
description: Markdown-native AI agent orchestrator — dispatch coding tasks from a kanban board

scripts.dev:full: sh -c 'PORT=${PORT:-3000}; CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT=${CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT:-4749}; cargo run -p conductor-cli -- --workspace . start --port $CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT & CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:$CONDUCTOR_BACKEND_PORT bun run --cwd packages/web dev -- --port $PORT'
scripts.prod:prepare: pnpm --dir packages/cli build && bun run --cwd packages/web build && cargo build -p conductor-cli --release
scripts.clean: bun run --cwd packages/web clean && cargo clean
